x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery credentials are required to authenticate and collect detailed CI attributes. Gaps in credential coverage mean Now Assist receives partial or empty CI data for uncovered infrastructure classes.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure discovery credentials for all key CI classes via discovery_credential_list.do. Ensure coverage across Windows (WMI), Linux (SSH), Network (SNMP), VMware (vCenter API), and Cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP). Credential gaps mean Now Assist ITOM receives partial or empty CI data.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Discovery credentials are required to authenticate and collect detailed CI attributes. Gaps in credential coverage mean Now Assist receives partial or empty CI data for uncovered infrastructure classes.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Discovery Credentials Coverage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("discovery_credentials");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table discovery_credentials not found", finding: "Discovery Credentials table (discovery_credentials) is not available. Verify the Discovery plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("discovery_credentials");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active discovery credentials configured";
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active discovery credentials. Now Assist ITOM has broad authenticated access to infrastructure for current CI data." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active discovery credential(s) (target: 5+). Missing credentials mean some CI classes are not being discovered — Now Assist ITOM will have partial infrastructure context." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active discovery credentials configured. Without credentials, discovery cannot authenticate to infrastructure targets — Now Assist ITOM will have no reliable CI data." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005984</number>
<order>50</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure discovery credentials for all key CI classes via discovery_credential_list.do. Ensure coverage across Windows (WMI), Linux (SSH), Network (SNMP), VMware (vCenter API), and Cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP). Credential gaps mean Now Assist ITOM receives partial or empty CI data.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4a</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
